issues: Byline is wrong: the article begins with 'Sun News Services' as the byline, but the draft attributes it correctly — however the OCR shows 'Sun News Services' appears mid-column before the Sockeyes paragraph, so that is accurate. On reflection the byline is correct.

Player name misspelled in long description: 'Jason Philips' (single 'l') matches OCR, but the roster spells it 'Jason Phillips' — the OCR is the source of truth for what the article says, so this is acceptable. However the long description says 'Jason Philips scoring short-handed in the first' which is accurate per OCR.

The long description omits the other third-period scorers mentioned in the OCR: Bill Hardy and Mike McCormick scored Richmond's third-period insurance markers alongside Philips' second goal. The draft only vaguely says 'Richmond scored three unanswered goals in the third period' without naming Hardy and McCormick.
The long description says 'a Sockeyes victory Tuesday night at Richmond Arena would sweep the series' — the OCR specifies the game time as 7:30, a minor omission but not an error.
The headline 'Sockeyes one more win away' is confirmed correct by OCR.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: The Richmond Sockeyes took a 4-0 series lead in the BCJHL championship playoffs with a 5-1 win over the Kelowna Packers on Saturday, one victory away from a sweep.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes moved to within one win of sweeping the best-of-nine BCJHL championship playoff series, taking a 4-0 lead with a 5-1 road victory over the Kelowna Packers on Saturday. Coach Orland Kurtenbach said the team was on a "natural high" and looked forward to clinching Tuesday night at Richmond Arena (7:30 p.m.). Jason Philips opened the scoring with a short-handed goal in the first period, Dave Tomlinson made it 2-0 early in the second before Kelowna's Brent Mowery cut the lead to 2-1, and Richmond then scored three unanswered third-period goals from Philips, Bill Hardy, and Mike McCormick.
review.notes: The page contains two adjacent non-Sockeyes articles (Kamloops Blazers/Rob Brown injury and Vancouver Canucks vs. Winnipeg Jets), which appear as OCR noise. The Sockeyes article is clearly identifiable. Long description corrected to include all named third-period scorers (Philips, Hardy, McCormick) as stated in OCR.
